posts.author: jfhgxfck
posts.text: Groww Overtaking Zerodha — I agree with the core idea here. In the long run, the strength of any business really comes down to the quality of the product and how well it keeps evolving. If the product genuinely solves a problem, growth tends to follow naturally without needing aggressive marketing. At the same time, there’s always a balance to strike. Relying only on product-led growth can limit reach, while heavy spending on advertising can sometimes dilute the original philosophy or user trust. The key challenge is finding a middle ground where growth doesn’t compromise the principles that b…
